subcodes.title: Words spoken at Shrine of the Báb, 1920-09-05
subcodes.first_line: Do you like it here? Do you like the view here? ... This truth is that this place has a spiritual atmosphere... His Holiness Elijah was once in a cave near here.
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @stories; anecdotes, @Shrines and Holy places, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
